per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've also been experiencing some difficulty breathing and wheezing when I cough or exert myself. It feels like my chest is tight too.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I know it can be scary to think about, but do you notice any sweating or feeling faint during these episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I have been having night sweats, soaking through my pajamas every single night for four nights now. It's been really concerning and frustrating because I don't understand what's causing it.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I can see this is taking a toll on you. How has your energy been? Your appetite?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My energy's really low, to be honest. I've lost my appetite completely - even thinking about food makes me feel tired.
